summary: The page faithfully reproduces all 11 design sections in correct order with the appropriate EDS signature classes (eds-header, eds-announcement-banner, eds-hero-banner, eds-card, eds-video, eds-isi, eds-footer) and accurate text content. The main visual defect is the hero banner image being collapsed to ~60px height instead of 461px, plus several minor icon-positioning and ISI text styling failures.

issues.expected: Hero image rendered at 1070x461px with headline, TO-DAY LIST logo, Why EPCLUSA? CTA and description overlaid
issues.actual: Hero image collapses to ~1070x60px; the headline, logo, CTA, and description text are not visible in the render
issues.fix: Remove the aspect-ratio/overflow rules forcing collapse; ensure .ep-hero-inner sizes to image height (461px @1366) and overlay content is positioned/visible

issues.expected: Hepatitis B virus reactivation list item at 15px font-size
issues.fix: Set font-size to 15px for the bold list item per token/heading class

issues.actual: rgb(33,37,41) inherited from Bootstrap on some text
issues.fix: Force color:#000000 on the affected ISI/RTF text nodes
Increase top-nav link gaps/alignment to shift icons right to spec

issues.expected: magnify icon x=314, image x=225, button x=877, bottle x=799
issues.actual: magnify x=352, image x=193, button x=907, bottle x=768
issues.fix: Adjust card image column widths and paddings to match spec x-positions
Set font-weight:700 for the intro body paragraph as measured

issues.expected: Gilead logo positioned left within content max-width
issues.actual: Logo offset via padding-left:255px which may misalign at different widths
issues.fix: Verify logo alignment matches design x-position consistently
